text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Mhm. It's nice to see the students going 
about their daily lives with such vigor.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
However, my presence seems 
to have put some on edge.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I understand, but I do wish they'd 
find me more approachable…

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps I should take a page from Fuji Kiseki. 
Learning magic tricks might soften my image.
